---
title: 'Final Project: VIX Time Series Analysis Report'
subtitle: "Prof. Tomoyuki Ichiba"
author: "Aarti Garaye (aartigaraye@ucsb.edu)"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
urlcolor: blue
output: pdf_document
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{tikz}
  - \usepackage{amsmath}
  - \usepackage{amsthm}
  - \usepackage{bbm}
  - \usepackage{float}
  - \usepackage{xcolor}
  - \DeclareMathOperator{\sign}{sign}
  - \DeclareMathOperator{\Cov}{Cov}
  - \DeclareMathOperator{\Var}{Var}
  - \newcommand{\indep}{\perp\!\!\!\perp}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

#
